title: Dungeons-like 3D Mace
description: New mace model based on several things from Minecraft Dungeons
body:
Remodels the new mace item to have a cube as the head rather than the whole thing being a sprite, resembling several weapons in Minecraft Dungeons.

![Armor stand holding a mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c04bdec13d2139ddc4d19ad0f07bbde3ffdb0bb0.png)
